'''thochadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wacken|wacken]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ch-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wacken|wacken]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thochadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thochadhithi|thochadhithi]] || [[word:thochadhiji|thochadhiji]] || [[word:thochadhishi|thochadhishi]] || [[word:thochadhiki|thochadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thochadhuthuthu|thochadhuthuthu]] || [[word:thochadhujuju|thochadhujuju]] || [[word:thochadhushushu|thochadhushushu]] || [[word:thochadhukuku|thochadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochadhuthu|thochadhuthu]] || [[word:thochadhuju|thochadhuju]] || [[word:thochadhushu|thochadhushu]] || [[word:thochadhuku|thochadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochadhufthuf|thochadhufthuf]] || [[word:thochadhufjuf|thochadhufjuf]] || [[word:thochadhufshuf|thochadhufshuf]] || [[word:thochadhufkuf|thochadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thochadhethe|thochadhethe]] || [[word:thochadheje|thochadheje]] || [[word:thochadheshe|thochadheshe]] || [[word:thochadheke|thochadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thochadhothotho|thochadhothotho]] || [[word:thochadhojojo|thochadhojojo]] || [[word:thochadhoshosho|thochadhoshosho]] || [[word:thochadhokoko|thochadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochadhotho|thochadhotho]] || [[word:thochadhojo|thochadhojo]] || [[word:thochadhosho|thochadhosho]] || [[word:thochadhoko|thochadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochadhofthof|thochadhofthof]] || [[word:thochadhofjof|thochadhofjof]] || [[word:thochadhofshof|thochadhofshof]] || [[word:thochadhofkof|thochadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfthĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfjĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfshĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfkĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfthĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfjĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfshĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfkĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfthĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfjĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfshĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thochadhĂŻfkĂŻf|thochadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thochadhĂŠthĂŠ|thochadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thochadhĂŠjĂŠ|thochadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thochadhĂŠshĂŠ|thochadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thochadhĂŠkĂŠ|thochadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thochadhathatha|thochadhathatha]] || [[word:thochadhajaja|thochadhajaja]] || [[word:thochadhashasha|thochadhashasha]] || [[word:thochadhakaka|thochadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochadhatha|thochadhatha]] || [[word:thochadhaja|thochadhaja]] || [[word:thochadhasha|thochadhasha]] || [[word:thochadhaka|thochadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochadhafthaf|thochadhafthaf]] || [[word:thochadhafjaf|thochadhafjaf]] || [[word:thochadhafshaf|thochadhafshaf]] || [[word:thochadhafkaf|thochadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thochadhasha|thochadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thochadhshĂ«sha|thochadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thochadhrosha|thochadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thochadhmusha|thochadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thochadhyasha|thochadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothochadhnkshĂ«sha|gothochadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothochadhnkrosha|gothochadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothochadhnkmusha|gothochadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothochadhnkyasha|gothochadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thochachadhasha|thochachadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thochachadhshĂ«sha|thochachadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thochachadhrosha|thochachadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thochachadhmusha|thochachadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thochachadhyasha|thochachadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothochachadhnkshĂ«sha|gothochachadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothochachadhnkrosha|gothochachadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothochachadhnkmusha|gothochachadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothochachadhnkyasha|gothochachadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thechĂŠdhasha|thechĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thechĂŠdhshĂ«sha|thechĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thechĂŠdhrosha|thechĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thechĂŠdhmusha|thechĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thechĂŠdhyasha|thechĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothechĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gothechĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothechĂŠdhnkrosha|gothechĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothechĂŠdhnkmusha|gothechĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothechĂŠdhnkyasha|gothechĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thochfadhasha|thochfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thochfadhshĂ«sha|thochfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thochfadhrosha|thochfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thochfadhmusha|thochfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thochfadhyasha|thochfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothochfadhnkshĂ«sha|gothochfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothochfadhnkrosha|gothochfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothochfadhnkmusha|gothochfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothochfadhnkyasha|gothochfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
